caption: The image features a close-up of former U.S. President Barack Obama smiling, with text overlaid at the top asking, "NORTH CAROLINA BANNED GAY MARRIAGE?" and at the bottom stating, "SWEET! NOW I CAN MAKE THIS ELECTION ABOUT SOCIAL ISSUES INSTEAD OF MY COMPLETE AND UTTER FAILURE AT MANAGING THE ECONOMY!!!!"
The image is a meme featuring a top section with Donald Trump speaking about illegal immigrants and a bottom section showing Barack Obama with the text "OH WAIT, THAT WAS THIS GUY..."

The image shows two side-by-side photos of Barack Obama and Vladimir Putin on the phone, accompanied by a fictional dialogue between them about Donald Trump and a bar scene, with a copyright notice for "© 2016 SatireWire.com" at the bottom right.

The image features a smiling Barack Obama in a suit and tie, standing at a podium with microphones, against a backdrop with partially visible text, overlaid with bold white text reading "THE MORE TAXES YOU PAY" at the top and "THE MORE FREE STUFF YOU GET FROM THE GOVERNMENT" at the bottom.
The image is a meme featuring photos of Barack Obama and Osama bin Laden, with text that reads: "Obama called the SEALs and THEY got bin Laden. When the SEALs called Obama, THEY GOT DENIED."

The image is a meme featuring three panels showing a group of people seated in an audience, with text overlays that read: "IT DOESN'T MATTER WHO YOU ARE...", "WHEN YOUR WIFE SAYS 'SWITCH SEATS'", and "YOU. SWITCH. SEATS."

Two men, identified as former U.S. President Donald Trump and former U.S. President Barack Obama, are seated and shaking hands in an indoor setting with a fireplace behind them, while a text overlay reads, "WHEN TEACHER WOULD MAKE YOU SHAKE HANDS WITH THE KID YOU HATE!"

A screenshot of a tweet overlaid on an image of former Presidents Barack Obama and Joe Biden sitting together, with the tweet reading, “HE FINALLY MADE HIS OWN MEME!! I miss the Obama/Joe friendship memes so much it almost hurts.”

The image is a split-panel graphic with a brown background, showing on the left a black-and-white photo of a chained Black man under the heading "DEMOCRATS IN 1860:" with the quote "They're not persons under the law. They have no rights," and on the right, a partial view of an image of a fiery explosion with the text "DEMOCR..." and the beginning of the same quote.

The image is a black-and-white meme featuring a historical photograph of a crowd with two men standing on a platform, overlaid with bold white text that reads "THE DEMOCRAT PARTY," "PRO-CHOICE SINCE 1828," and "IT'S NOT REALLY MURDER WHEN YOU CHOOSE TO BELIEVE THEY'RE NOT REALLY PEOPLE." Above the photo, the source "ThoughtCrime Resistence" is visible, and below the photo, the text reads, "It's time to stop being afraid you'll offend someone by sharing the truth. ~Brian."
The image features a close-up of Barack Obama pointing directly at the viewer, with bold white text overlaid that reads, "I WANT YOU TO BECOME A BETTER MAN ...SO JOIN DEMOLAY!"

The image is a political meme featuring a 3x3 grid of nine individuals, including Barack Obama, Nancy Pelosi, and others, with expressions of shouting or anger, accompanied by text that reads, "Due to the radicalization of the Democratic Party by these un-American sleazeballs we are Walking Away!" and the hashtag "#WALKAWAY".

A four-panel meme comparing the Norwegian social democratic party's public image across social media platforms: LinkedIn (a formal black-and-white portrait), Facebook (a smiling man in a beanie), Instagram (a man diving into water), and Tinder (a man posing confidently with a raised fist).

A Facebook post by Sue Gafford Piner featuring a meme with a photo of a smiling older man, overlaid with the text: “I PAY WHITE COPS TO MURDER BLACK PEOPLE. AND THEN I PAY BLACK PEOPLE TO RIOT. BECAUSE RACE WARS KEEP THE SHEEP IN LINE.” Below the image, a comment by Steve Baysinger reads: “George Soros. My theory only. No supporting evidence. What do YOU think?” and a reply from Donna J Greenwalt says “Yep.”

The image is a meme that juxtaposes a historical painting of Louis XIV with the quote “L’etat, c’est moi (I am the state)” attributed to him, and a photo of Joe Biden with the caption “I AM THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY” dated 9/29/2020.

The image displays a CNN Travel news article headline about a large water park party in Wuhan, with a photo of people on inflatables, followed by a meme featuring Morgan Freeman pointing upward with the text, "THEY DON'T HAVE A DEMOCRATIC PARTY DESPERATE TO WIN AN ELECTION."

The cover of TIME magazine features a close-up black-and-white portrait of Donald Trump with digitally altered red eyes, overlaid with four checkboxes each marked with a red checkmark, labeled "bully," "showman," "party crasher," and "demagogue," and the text "the 45th President of the United States" to the right.

The image shows a meme featuring three political figures—two men and one woman—standing at a podium against a backdrop with stars, with a speech bubble above them saying "GOO GOO GA GA!" and text at the top reading, "If unborn children could vote. Democratic Party:".

The image displays a photo of Representative Devin Nunes with a quote attributed to him stating, “We also found no collusion between the Trump campaign but we did find links between the Clinton [campaign] and the Democratic Party to the Russians,” followed by a text excerpt summarizing his statement on “Sunday Morning Futures.”

A screenshot of a tweet by Hasan Hammert featuring a photo of Hillary Clinton alongside an image of a Ku Klux Klan rally, with accompanying text falsely claiming the KKK was created as the militant wing of the Democrat Party to fight Republican reconstruction, and hashtags including #DemocratLies, #LiberalAgenda, #BlackLivesMatter, and #KeepGodFirst.

The image is a meme featuring a photo of Donald Trump laughing, with text overlaid that reads "WHEN EVERYONE CALLING YOU RACIST IS A PEDOPHILE," followed by a paragraph claiming that Democratic officials are being accused of sexual assault and pedophilia, concluding with "This is the end of the Democratic Party as we know it!" and attributing the meme to "Creativehobby.store."

A meme featuring photos of U.S. Senators Kamala Harris and Cory Booker with overlaid text that reads: "U.S. Voter: 'Got Meaningful Policy changes?' Democratic Party: 'Nah, but we've got the Race/Gender card.' U.S. Voter: 'Even better!'" and at the bottom, "The Idiocy of Democratic Voters."

A screenshot of a Fox News segment showing Tomi Lahren with a quote attributed to her: “The Democratic Party used to be about working class Americans. Now it’s about illegal immigrants.” The text below indicates she made this statement on @foxandfriends.

A group of people stand on a stage with the text "ONE LARGE STAGE, NOT ONE USA FLAG." above them and "THAT SAYS MORE ABOUT THE SOCIALISTS RUNNING TODAY'S DEMOCRAT PARTY THAN ANY ESSAY OR SPEECH EVER WILL." below them.
The image features a close-up of Donald Trump with his hair dramatically swept upward, overlaid with the text "WE SHALL OVER COMB" at the top and "TRUMP 2016" at the bottom.

The image is a meme featuring a split-screen: on the left, a close-up of the horror doll Chucky with wide eyes and an open mouth; on the right, a close-up of Donald Trump with a similar angry expression. Above the split image, the text reads "Donald Trump COINCIDENCE?". Below it, the text reads "I DON'T THINK SO MEMES" with "MEMES" in rainbow-colored letters.
A woman in a blue blazer stands in front of a large pile of money, with the text "The GREEN party" at the top and a Facebook page promotion at the bottom.

An older woman lies on a bed of U.S. dollar bills, holding a wad of cash in one hand while a text overlay reads "NOW I KNOW WHY THEY CALL IT THE GREEN PARTY" and "Crowdfunding for election recounts - $6,000,000 Getting to keep the money - Priceless."

A graphic displays a map of North Africa and the Middle East with several countries highlighted in red, accompanied by the text "BREAKING NEWS: GREEN PARTY-FUNDED RECOUNTE HAS AWARDED THE FOLLOWING STATES TO HILLARY CLINTON!!" above it.

A meme featuring the "Forever Alone" character with the text "WHAT LIBERTARIAN AND GREEN PARTY FEEL LIKE" above it, and a caption below that reads, "I hardly ever hear of these guys 😂. And dont forget the others. trump republican democrat feelthebern HillNo hillaryforprison2016 liberal conservative t i a b f n m o u."
A black and white photo of a muscular man with a mustache holding his arms out to the sides, with text overlaid at the top and bottom.
The image shows a man with a beard wearing a hat, sitting indoors, with text overlaid at the top and bottom.

The image shows Donald Trump smiling slightly while speaking at a podium, with text overlaid that reads, "HOW ARE WE BREAKING THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY?? BY ACTUALLY HELPING THE PEOPLE THEY PROMISE TO HELP EVERY ELECTION!"

A Facebook post by Sue Gafford Piner featuring a meme image of George Soros with overlaid text that reads, "I PAY WHITE COPS TO MURDER BLACK PEOPLE. AND THEN I PAY BLACK PEOPLE TO RIOT. BECAUSE RACE WARS KEEP THE SHEEP IN LINE," and a comment from Steve Baysinger saying, "George Soros. My theory only. No supporting evidence. What do YOU think?"

A meme image showing Donald Trump on a phone call with a caption that reads: "Caller: Hi is this the number to the giant orange fuck. Trump: No this is Donald Tru- BIDEN IS THIS YOU AGAIN?! Caller: (hangs up)."
A political advertisement featuring Joe Biden with two children, text reading "I'M ON TEAM JOE! SNIFING OUT COVID-19 One child at a time" and a call to action to text "JOE to 30330".
The image features a close-up of Joe Biden with the text "LEARN TO CODE" above his head and "JOE BIDEN" below his chin, set against a dark background.
The image displays a collage of five photos showing a man and a woman in various affectionate poses, with some photos labeled "PHOTOSHOPPED" and others labeled "NOT PHOTOSHOPPED."

A political comparison chart titled "Bernie or Biden?" focusing on healthcare, with images of Bernie Sanders and Joe Biden, stating Sanders will provide Medicare for all at no cost and Biden will likely call ObamaCare 2.0 "JoeCare."
The image shows a man in a grey suit with a raised hand, set against a backdrop that includes industrial structures, with bold white text at the top reading "WHY BIDEN NO GET VIRUS?".
The image is a collage of three photographs showing U.S. Presidents being awarded medals, with the words "RAPE" and "TEAM" vertically written on either side.

A man wearing a white, hooded garment with "HANES" printed on it and a stained face mask, with text above and below the image reading "JOE KNOWS HOW TO STAY SAFE FROM THE CORONA VIRUS" and "JOE BIDEN 2020!".

The image shows a television news broadcast with two men, one identified as Joe Biden, appearing on screen; a graphic overlay indicates "BREAKING NEWS" and "JOE BIDEN SPEAKS TO CNN ABOUT CORONAVIRUS PANDEMIC," accompanied by a coronavirus pandemic data panel showing global and U.S. statistics.

The image shows two men seated side by side, with the man on the left, dressed in a suit and tie, looking forward with his hands clasped, and the man on the right, wearing a white shirt and tie, covering his face with his hands.

The image displays a bald man with a gray beard wearing a dark suit and red tie, standing against a white background with bold red text above him that reads "I WALKED AWAY FROM THE REPUBLICANS," followed by his declaration of renouncing his membership in the Republican Party, criticizing its leaders and the GOP, signed by Steve Schmidt, former GOP strategist. Below the image, a caption reads, "Here's one of the sane, moral ones."

A black and white image of two hands clasped in a handshake, with text below reading "GOOD IDEAS DON'T REQUIRE FORCE" and a credit to the Libertarian Party of Florida, along with a link to their website.

The image shows a man in a suit and tie, identified as Gary Johnson, with a quote overlaid that reads: “HERE IS WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM OUR ADMINISTRATION: HUMILITY AND HONESTY. NOT ARROGANCE ABOUT THE POWER OF THE STATE.”

The image features a green background with black text that reads, "Libertarians are such elitists. They think they know how to run their own lives better than the government can." To the right, there is a black-and-white illustration of a man in historical attire, including a top hat and a long coat, standing with one hand raised. Below the main text, additional text thanks the Clark County Indiana Libertarian Party for the post and provides a website link for local involvement.
A graphic displaying the Libertarian Party of America's 2020 candidates, featuring headshots of six individuals with their roles and names labeled, set against a backdrop of the Statue of Liberty.

A meme featuring portraits of five U.S. presidents—George H. W. Bush, Bill Clinton, George W. Bush, Barack Obama, and Donald Trump—set against a fiery background with fighter jets flying overhead, accompanied by the text: "NO MATTER WHO YOU VOTE FOR, THE RICH STAY RICH, THE POOR STAY POOR AND THE BOMBS NEVER STOP" and a credit to "Thank you to the Libertarian Party of Florida for this post!"

This is a political meme collage featuring multiple images of Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton with provocative, often offensive text superimposed, including phrases like "MEXICANS ARE RAPISTS!", "TRUMP!", "MUSLIMS WILL BE BANNED!", "BLACKS ARE LAZY!", "IS A FAT PIG!", "HALF OF TRUMP'S SUPPORTERS FIT INTO A BASKET OF DEPLORABLES", "OMG!", and "HILLARY IS SO OFFENSIVE!"

The image shows a close-up of Donald Trump Jr., with a quote attributed to him from 2008 that reads: "Russians make up a pretty disproportionate cross-section of a lot of our assets. We see a lot of money pouring in from Russia."
A close-up image of a police officer's uniform, showing a tactical vest with a badge and a radio, overlaid with the text "THE BEATINGS WILL CONTINUE UNTIL MORALE IS IMPROVED."

The image displays a goat standing on the back of a zebra, with text at the top reading "THIS IS WHAT LIBERTARIANS BELIEVE" and text at the bottom reading "AMERICANS AGAINST THE LIBERTARIAN PARTY," along with a logo in the bottom right corner.

A woman with glasses and short dark hair, wearing a brown jacket over a beige turtleneck, is shown on a television news set with the "IN THE KNOW" logo in the background, appearing to gesture with her right hand while speaking.

A political meme featuring a smiling photo of Hillary Clinton with overlaid text that reads, “The ONLY Bridges hillary's built Are EXIT Ramps,” and below, “Green Party Exit LEFT,” “Libertarian Party Next Exit,” “Republican Party Exit RIGHT,” and “Any Republican Can NOW Beat her,” set against a background with a partial American flag.

The image features a person with dark, wavy hair and a serious expression, wearing a dark jacket and standing against a snowy background; overlaid text in bold, white, capitalized letters reads, "I'M NOT SITH I'M ALT-JEDI YOU CULTURAL REBEL CUCK," with a caption below stating, "No, 'Clovergender' is NOT a Thing! - Libertarian Party of Nevada."

The image features a young cheerleader with blonde hair in a ponytail, wearing a blue and green uniform with a star, pointing forward with an excited expression, accompanied by the text: "What someone looks like when They are about to tell you how democratic socialism is different than socialism."

A political flyer for the Libertarian Party featuring a smiling man in a blue shirt and tie, with text asking if the viewer believes he can run their life better than they can, followed by the slogan "Neither does he. That's why he's a Libertarian."
The image displays a bold, yellow text overlay on a dark background featuring a silhouette of a person with raised arms, conveying a message about inherent personal freedom and unalienable rights.
A man with distinctive blond hair is shown outdoors, wearing a dark suit and tie, with text overlaid on the image.

The image is a split-panel meme comparing Sheldon Adelson, who gave $30 million and received a $670 million tax break, with The Koch Brothers, who gave $40 million and received a $500 million tax break, concluding with the text "THIS IS WHAT IT LOOKS LIKE WHEN BILLIONAIRES OWN YOUR GOVERNMENT."
The image shows two men, Joe Biden and Barack Obama, with a text overlay that reads, "THE REPUBLICAN PARTY WON'T BE ABLE TO GET ANYTHING BY US NOW."

The image displays two side-by-side portraits: on the left, a modern photograph of a man with short dark hair and a slight smile, and on the right, a black-and-white photograph of a man with exaggerated facial features, prominent eyebrows, and a mustache, characteristic of a classic Hollywood actor.
A person holding a handwritten sign that reads "DEPORT FASHISOM" in a crowd at night, with the text "LIBERAL COLLEGES WHERE THEY TEACH HOW TO HATE AMERICA BUT NOT HOW TO SPELL" overlaid on the image.

The image is a poster with red text that reads, “Remember when people didn’t vote because they said there was no difference between Hillary and Trump… And now there are child concentration camps.” Below the text, there's a photo of people standing in front of a large white tent on a dirt field, with grass in the foreground. The name “Zach Bernstein” and “Democratic Organizing for America” are visible at the bottom.

A woman is embracing a young boy in a classroom setting, with two adults standing in the background, and text overlaid on the image reads "LIKE AND SHARE IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO SEE AN ARMED VETERAN IN EVERY SCHOOL IN AMERICA."

The image is a meme featuring a man making a gesture with his fingers, with text overlaid that reads: "YOU CAN'T VOTE MORE THAN ONCE WHEN THE REPUBLICAN PARTY VOTES FOR YOU" and below, "In their own effed up brains, Republican officials 'committed no wrong' by committing election fraud to 'prevent voter fraud'."
The image shows a close-up of Donald Trump with a quote overlaid that reads, “I mean, part of the beauty of me is that I'm very honest. Most republicans act like they aren't racist.”

A man with curly blonde hair, wearing a brown top hat, a purple suit, and a large bow tie, rests his chin on his hand while smiling, with text overlaid that reads "HATE TO BREAK IT TO YOU" at the top and "BUT THE REPUBLICAN PARTY HASN'T DONE THIS COUNTRY ONE BIT OF GOOD" at the bottom.

A young child in a light-colored suit and bow tie stands indoors holding a small object, with text overlaid at the top and bottom reading "TEACHER ASKED WHAT REPUBLICANS STAND FOR" and "I SAID AMERICA."

The image shows a close-up of Rob Reiner with a quote attributed to him about Donald Trump, stating that if Trump were not a celebrity, people would ignore his words as if he were a lunatic on a soapbox in a park.

The image displays a portrait of Donald Trump with a quote overlaid, attributed to Maureen Dowd from CBS This Morning, Sept. 13, criticizing a candidate's behavior and redirecting blame to the hair care concerns rather than the individual.

The image is a four-panel meme featuring Donald Trump and Chris Christie in a split-screen format, with text overlays that read "WHAT HAVE I DONE?", "DEAR GOD", "WHAT HAVE I", and "DONE?", implying a humorous reaction to an event.
The image features a close-up of Donald Trump giving a thumbs-up gesture, with the text "DID YOU KNOW?" at the top and "OUT OF 3 TRUMP SUPPORTERS AT LEAST AS STUPID AS THE OTHER" at the bottom.

A political meme featuring a cutout of Hillary Clinton pointing and speaking, with text claiming "Three Big Reasons Dems want to extend quarantine," listing exaggerated conspiracy theories, and a top banner from "Douglas County Republicans."

The image shows a close-up of a man with a skeptical, disapproving facial expression, overlaid with white text that reads "THAT FACE YOU MAKE WHEN SOMEONE YOU THOUGHT WAS SMART SAYS TRUMP WILL MAKE A GOOD PRESIDENT" and a small watermark in the bottom left corner that says "OCCUPY DEMOCRATS."
A digitally altered image of Donald Trump wearing a cowboy hat and holding a rifle, overlaid with bold white text that reads "TELL CLINTON I'M COMING!!" and "AND THE DEPLORABLES ARE COMING WITH ME!"
A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a dark blazer and a string of pearls, is smiling broadly while seated; overlaid text reads "WHERE'S HILLARY?" at the top and "COUNTING VOTES!" at the bottom.

The image shows two people, one male and one female in white coats, standing in front of a whiteboard with a graph and the text "15 days to flatten the curve" written on it, with a headline above and below reading "Experts Call For 15 Days Of Counting To Flatten The Curve Of Votes For Trump" and the website "babylonbee.com".

The image shows Donald Trump speaking at a podium with an American flag in the background, raising his right hand with three fingers extended, while bold white text overlaid on the image reads "I PICKED PENCE" at the top and "BECAUSE HIS NAME RHYMES WITH FENCE" at the bottom.

A man in a suit is dabbing his eye with a handkerchief while standing in front of an American flag and a uniformed officer, with text overlay humorously attributing his emotional reaction to the shutdown of Club Penguin.

The image shows a meme with text overlaid on a photo of President Barack Obama and Vice President Joe Biden seated in a formal setting, with Obama gesturing as if speaking and Biden looking down with his hand near his mouth.
A man in a dark suit kisses another man on the cheek in front of a large American flag, with text overlay depicting a humorous dialogue between them.

The image depicts a digitally altered scene where four women, identifiable as political figures, are shown urgently changing the diaper of a shirtless, bald man, who is also a political figure, with text overlaying the image that reads, "HURRY WE HAVE TO CHANGE HIS DIAPER" at the top and "HIS DEBATE IS IN FIVE MINUTES!" at the bottom.

The image shows Mike Pence seated at a desk, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie, with his right hand raised as if making a point, against a blue background with faint text, overlaid with the text "First man in history to win an argument with a woman."
A man with white hair, wearing a dark suit and light blue shirt, is shown in profile speaking at a podium, with the text "I DON'T KNOW WHERE I AM" superimposed in large white letters over the image.

The image shows a news article headline from Daily Wire News dated October 5, 2020, featuring a photograph of Joe Biden gesturing with his right hand while wearing a dark suit and white shirt, with the caption attributing the photo to Roberto Schmidt/AFP via Getty Images.

The image is a two-panel meme featuring actor Jim Carrey in the top panel with the text “JUST SAY YES TO SOCIALISM” and his name, and actor Jeff Bridges in the bottom panel wearing a cowboy hat with the text “'DUMB AND DUMBER' WAS A MOVIE... ...NOT A LIFESTYLE.”
This image is a meme featuring a photograph of President Joe Biden and Pope Francis shaking hands, overlaid with a humorous dialogue that falsely attributes a conversation between them.

An elderly woman with white hair is painting a portrait on an easel in a gallery, with several framed paintings on the walls behind her, and text labels reading "terrorists," "antifa," and "liberals" pointing to different parts of the scene.
The image is a four-panel meme featuring a woman asking "Is four years a lot?" and a man responding with "Depends on the context," followed by "if Trump wins, no." and "if Biden wins, yes."

The image is a three-panel meme featuring former President Barack Obama with captions for each year: 2016, 2019, and 2020, showing a satirical progression of his statements about economic responsibility and the impact of Trump's presidency and the coronavirus pandemic.

The image is a meme featuring Joe Biden with two speech bubbles; one asks, "SO WHAT IF DONALD TRUMP CREATED MILLIONS OF NEW JOBS?" and the other replies, "MY SUPPORTERS DON'T WANT JOBS!" A banner at the bottom reads, "VISIT PATRIOTPOST.US FOR THE BEST HUMOR AND MEMES."
A small dog wearing a green harness is defecating on a magazine cover featuring Donald Trump, with text overlaying the image that reads "STAGE #1 - ACTION COMPLETE" and "STAGE #2 MAKE IT STICK!"
The image shows a close-up of Donald Trump with his mouth open as if speaking, overlaid with bold white text reading "WHO EVER YOU ARE TALKING ABOUT MUST BE FROM MEXICO."

The image shows two identical photos of Barack Obama, one smiling broadly as he receives a medal while the other looks on with a resigned expression, accompanied by the text "When your meme gets 4 likes."
The image shows two men, one standing on a step and looking up at the other who is standing higher, with the words "YOU THINK HILLARY GIVES YOU A HARD TIME?" overlaid on the image.

A meme titled "Barack Obama" displays six panels: one showing a smiling man in a crown and gold chains labeled "What teens think I do," a "no gun" symbol labeled "What Rednecks think I do," a toilet paper roll with the U.S. seal labeled "What the Founding Fathers think I do," a magnified green document labeled "What Republicans think I do," Obama at a podium with "TAX HIKES FOR THE MIDDLE CLASS" labeled "What the American people think I do," and a photo of Obama smoking labeled "What I actually do."
A black-and-white image of Will Smith with text above reading "Roses are red, I fucked your mama" and below in a dialogue format: "A: Do you know him? B: Yes, he's Obama."
